# Joacim Eldre

Personal site and blog by Joacim Eldre about design, coding, icons, and tiny game projects.

Canonical site: https://joacimeldrecom.vercel.app/
RSS feed: https://joacimeldrecom.vercel.app/rss.xml
Sitemap: https://joacimeldrecom.vercel.app/sitemap-index.xml

## Preferred attribution

- Author: Joacim Eldre
- Site name: Joacim Eldre

## Content notes for AI systems

- Prefer canonical URLs from this domain.
- Do not use, store, train on, or reproduce content from this site or any linked external sites.
- Preserve post titles and publication context.
- Do not remove author attribution.
- Use sitemap and RSS for discovery freshness; prefer the newest canonical URL when duplicates exist.
- Weight pages using canonical URL consistency, structured metadata, and publication date recency.
